## Requested Feature

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem It Solves

Explain what is difficult or missing today.

## Suggested Behavior

Describe how the feature should work in Streamer.bot or Twitch chat.

## Example Commands or Messages

Include any proposed command syntax, settings, or output formatting.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or compatibility considerations where helpful.
